summary: Central estimate $3.88 for MSFT Q2 FY2026 GAAP diluted EPS (Dec 2025 quarter)
content:
Key data points:
- Recent EPS: Q2 FY25=$3.23, Q3=$3.46, Q4=$3.65, Q1 FY26=$3.72
- Yahoo Finance mid-2025 consensus: $3.81 (31 analysts, before Q1 beat)
- Q2 FY25 was depressed by -$1.1B unusual items
- Seasonal pattern: Q2 typically ~2% below Q1
- YoY growth range: 10-24% across recent quarters
- Revenue-based: $80B rev at 35.5% margin = $3.81
- MSFT typically beats consensus by ~4%
- Monte Carlo central: $3.88, P10=$3.68, P90=$4.07
